_schema_note: This file is the integration contract. Everything the agent reasons over lives here. Organizers can replace/extend any array (sessions, venues, mentors) without touching code. Times are local ICT (UTC+7), 24h 'HH:MM'. 'capacity' is per the venue/RSVP; set null if unknown.

venues.name: Venue TBA
venues.label: Networking nights - address shared on registration

sessions.title: Registration & Welcome
sessions.description: Check in, get your badge, and kick off Build Week.

sessions.title: Render the Next Era of Creation with the BytePlus AI Stack
sessions.description: BytePlus (ByteDance's enterprise AI arm) opens the hood on the tools their own teams use to build at scale.

sessions.title: Antitech Session
sessions.description: Details to be announced.

sessions.title: Inside the NVIDIA Inception Program: How Startups Build & Scale AI Globally
sessions.description: NVIDIA Inception helps startups with compute, capital, and connections. Credits + GPU access + investor network.

sessions.title: TRAE in Your Professional Workflow
sessions.description: A practical look at rewiring how you work with agentic coding tools.

sessions.title: Community - OpenClaw
sessions.description: Community session. Details to be announced.

sessions.title: Image & Video AI Networking Night
sessions.description: Invite-only. ~100 practitioners building or backing image and video AI. Requires AABW registration.

sessions.title: AWS Workshop
sessions.description: Hands-on with the AWS AI stack. Meet AWS Solutions Architects (also track judges). Details TBA.

sessions.title: Agora Session
sessions.description: Details to be announced.

sessions.title: TinyFish Session
sessions.description: Details to be announced.

sessions.title: AI x Gaming Networking Night
sessions.description: Invite-only. ~100 people at the intersection of AI and gaming. Requires AABW registration.

sessions.title: Build, Deploy and Monetize AI Agents: The Future of the Developer Economy
sessions.description: Getting an agent deployed, used, and paying you. The second half of building agents.

sessions.title: Beyond Autocomplete: How Agentic AI Solves the Enterprise Design Bottleneck
sessions.description: The difference between plausible pixels and usable systems, with Google Developer Expert Linh Nguyen.

sessions.title: Tencent Cloud Session
sessions.description: Details to be announced.

sessions.title: Evening Community Night
sessions.description: Community night before Build Day.

sessions.title: Physical AI Networking Night
sessions.description: Invite-only. ~100 people in robotics and embodied AI. Requires AABW registration.

sessions.title: Build Day Keynotes
sessions.description: Keynote speakers incl. Girish Patil (AWS, Applied AI) and Dr. Benedict The (Vietjet, CDO).

sessions.title: Expert Parade + Networking
sessions.description: Meet mentors and enterprise experts across all tracks before you build.

sessions.title: Hackathon Build (heads-down + late-night)
sessions.description: On-site building. This is the hackathon. Submission is due 9:00 AM next morning.

sessions.title: Submission Deadline (Devpost)
sessions.description: Final submission due on Devpost. Late submissions are not accepted.

sessions.title: Demo Day
sessions.description: Teams present, judges score, enterprises evaluate for deployment.

sessions.title: Award Ceremony
sessions.description: Winners announced. Prizes + deployment conversations.

mentors.name: Nguyen Gia Hung
mentors.role: Head of Solutions Architect, VN & Cambodia

perks.name: NVIDIA Inception
perks.claim: Apply at the Day 1 NVIDIA session or nvidia.com/inception

perks.name: AWS Activate
perks.claim: Ask an AWS SA at the Day 2 AWS Office for a provider referral

perks.name: Partner credit drop
perks.value: API credits from OpenAI, Qwen, Notion, BytePlus and others

key_dates.label: Builder onboarding webinar (tracks + judging criteria preview)
Confirm your track on Devpost by 9:00 PM ICT (60 slots/track)
